title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.020 - Executions may issue, when
text:
513.020.  Executions may issue, when. — Executions may issue upon a judgment at any time within ten years after the rendition of such judgment.
(RSMo 1939 § 1278) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1113; 1919 § 1564; 1909 § 2133 
Execution from probate court on judgment against plaintiff on claim against estate, RSMo 473.410
